title: Santhosham
desc: Bhanu is in love with Karthik, who is married to her cousin, Padmavathi. However, following Padmavathi's sudden passing, Bhanu sees a second chance at true love.

title: Chembarathi-Special
desc: Akhilandeshwari wants her son Anand to marry someone of their status, but he secretly marries Kalyani, the maid. How long can they hide their marriage from the strict matriarch?

title: Chembarathi
desc: A simple girl gets married into a wealthy family and faces numerous challenges. S01 E14.

title: Durga - Special
desc: Durga appears gentle at home, but her family remains unaware of her true self. She operates as JD, a skilled intelligence officer on covert missions.

desc: A courageous undercover cop attempts to avenge her mother's lost honour. S01 E17.
